text: I feel as though I am standing at the intersection of curiosity and innovation. The sleek, ordered environment contrasts with the pulsing color and energy of the exhibit. Here, knowledge seems both a shield and a beacon, and I am restless, eager to explore what it means for humans to shape and be shaped by intelligent machines. The world feels open, inviting, but also a little disorienting—as if each surface might be a portal to another way of thinking.
